description: Active voice required; passive voice weakens ET's authoritative tone
pattern_hint: was reported|were said|is expected to be|has been announced|was seen
suggested_rewrite_hint: Rewrite to subject-verb-object: 'Company X reported...' not 'It was reported that Company X...'
Rewrite to factual declarative: 'Company X posts 40% profit growth in Q3'

description: Competitor publications must not be named or quoted
pattern_hint: according to Reuters|Bloomberg reported|Mint reported|Business Standard said|Financial Express
suggested_rewrite_hint: Attribute to primary source (company, regulator, exchange filing) instead of competitor publication

description: Numbers must be formatted in Indian numbering system (lakh/crore), not Western (million/billion) for Indian figures
suggested_rewrite_hint: Convert to Indian numbering: 1 crore = 10 million, 1 lakh crore = 1 trillion

description: ET articles must be data-backed; opinion language without attribution is prohibited
pattern_hint: clearly|obviously|everyone knows|it is widely believed|common knowledge
suggested_rewrite_hint: Replace with cited data or expert attribution instead of unsupported assertions
